untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Consecutive bar confirmation (5 bars above/below 20-MA) — not expressible without bar-indexing or counters; (2) Fibonacci retracement detection (61.8%-78.6% of prior move) — requires multi-bar range calculation and percentage measurement not available in allowed indicators; (3) Index component confirmation (70%+ of components moving same direction) — requires external data source not in allowed indicators list. These are complex pattern-matching requirements that exceed the capabilities of point-in-time indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Partially translated trend and retracement direction as basic MA crossover, but the core logic (sequential bar confirmation, Fibonacci retracement zones, and index component analysis) cannot be accurately expressed with available indicators. A proper implementation would require custom indicator functions for trend counting, retracement calculations, and composite index weighting.
